title: What a godly man does with the grudge
caption:
Most men holding a grudge will call it something else. "I'm just guarded now." "I'm being wise."

That's not wisdom. That's bitterness that learned to use better vocabulary.

A man of faith names it accurately. Takes it to God before he takes it anywhere else. Decides to forgive before the apology comes — not because the man deserved it, but because he himself received that same grace without deserving it.

"As the Lord forgave you, so also must you forgive." — Colossians 3:13

The grudge isn't hurting him anymore. It's been hurting you.

Save this for the one you've been holding for a while.

#faith #christianmen #forgiveness #godlymen #manofgod #thevision #colossians #grace #christianity
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
